fields.helpText: This field contains the patient for the paid Fee claim that may have  vendor and/or 5010 provider information automated to IB.

This field identifies the Fee program for the paid claim. Vendor and 5010  provider data is pulled from either the FEE BASIS PAYMENT(#162) file for  Outpatient, or the FEE BASIS INVOICE(#162.5) file for Inpatient during IB  automation.

This value is retrieved from the PAID message from Central Fee to identify the payment or invoice. Outpatient claim control numbers are formatted as comma-delimited strings that point to the specific line item in a claim. Inpatient claim control numbers are pointers to the FEE BASIS INVOICE(#162.5) file.
This field contains the date the MailMan message from Central Fee was  processed by the server.
The Line Item number from the FEE BASIS entry being processed.
This field identifies the provider type that is associated with this Line  Item.
This is the provider of Fee Basis services in the IB file.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:NO NPI UPDATES ATTEMPTED;1:NPI DATA INVALID;2:NPI MATCHED ACTIVE, NO UPDATES;3:NPI MATCHED INACTIVE, NO UPDATES;4:NPI MATCHED ACTIVE, IB UPDATED;5:NPI NEW, IB RECORD CREATED;
fields.helpText: This field provides information about updates to the NPI(#41.01) field of  the record in the IB/NON OTHER VA BILLING PROVIDER (#355.93) file as  pointed to by field #.07 in this file.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:NO TXY UPDATES ATTEMPTED;1:TXY CODE NOT FOUND IN 8932.1;2:MATCHED PRIMARY, NO UPDATES;3:MATCHED NON-PRIMARY, IB TXY UPDATES;4:NEW, IB TXY ENTRY CREATED;
fields.helpText: This field provides information about updates to the TAXONOMY CODE(#42)  field of the record in the IB/NON OTHER VA PROVIDER(#355.93) file as  pointed to by field #.07 in this file.
